Uses of Class
com.mimecast.robin.queue.QueueItem

Packages that use QueueItem
Package
Description
com.mimecast.robin.endpoints
HTTP endpoints for service monitoring and metrics.
com.mimecast.robin.queue
A persistent scheduled work queue for emails that could not be delivered.
